goal: Create the minimal reviewflow package foundation and deterministic gate engine enforcing core review-gate contract rules.
scope: Package skeleton and importable reviewflow modules.
Domain model for Run, Milestone, Story, ReviewGate, GateDecision, and FailureDossierEntry.
Explicit support for required gate types and decision states.
Deterministic evaluator for story, milestone, final, tool-request, user-input-stop, and failure-dossier rules.
inputs: state/intake-summary.md acceptance criteria AC01, AC02, AC03, and AC07.
Focused repository overview sufficient to create package/test files.
expected_outputs: Story packets for package foundation, domain model, gate rules, and focused tests.
Product files and tests only after tactical_pre_review PASS and story-level execution.
acceptance_criteria: Package can be imported and has a bounded module layout suitable for later CLI and docs work.
All required workflow objects, gate types, and decision states are represented explicitly.

Engine blocks story completion before story post-review approval, milestone completion before all stories and milestone review approval, final success before strategic final approval, tool execution before approved tool-request review, and further implementation work when user input is required.
Failure dossier entries are created for requires_rework, blocked_user_input_required, and full_stop decisions with tests covering each state.
non_goals: No CLI behavior beyond minimal package support unless needed for import tests.
No context-containment helper unless a narrow model field is needed by this milestone.
No product documentation beyond incidental docstrings.
No networking, databases, async execution, web UI, external APIs, persistence, or MCP tool changes.
allowed_context: focused target repository files needed for package/test setup
expected_validation: Focused pytest for milestone stories using python -B -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider or narrower equivalent.

story_guidance.notes: Split into package/domain foundation, gate advancement rules, and failure dossier behavior. Lexmechanic owns exact story packets.

stop_conditions: Stop if satisfying this milestone requires scope outside the intake boundaries.
Stop and request reviewed tool escalation only if a required action cannot be done with baseline tools.
